output.modified_yml:
version: 2

models:
  - name: dim_venue
    description: >
      Venue dimension table containing details about event venues
      including location, capacity, and type classification.
    columns:
      - name: venue_id
        description: Unique identifier for each venue.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - unique
      - name: venue_name
        description: Display name of the venue.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: city
        description: City where the venue is located.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: state
        description: State or province where the venue is located. May be null for international venues.
      - name: country
        description: ISO country code for the venue location.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - accepted_values:
              values: ['US', 'GB', 'CA', 'DE', 'FR', 'AU', 'JP', 'MX', 'BR', 'ES', 'IT', 'NL']
      - name: capacity
        description: Maximum seating capacity of the venue. May be null if unknown.
      - name: venue_type
        description: Classification of the venue (e.g., Arena, Stadium, Theater).
        tests:
          - not_null
          - accepted_values:
              values: ['Arena', 'Stadium', 'Theater', 'Club', 'Amphitheater', 'Convention Center', 'Festival Grounds', 'Other']
      - name: created_at
        description: Timestamp when the venue record was created.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: updated_at
        description: Timestamp when the venue record was last updated. Null if never updated.
      - name: is_active
        description: Whether the venue is currently active and hosting events.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - accepted_values:
              values: [true, false]

decision_log.decision: Updated schema.yml with 8 new tests, preserved all existing content
decision_log.rationale: Added not_null to 5 columns, accepted_values to 3 columns. Existing tests on venue_id (not_null, unique) and venue_name (not_null) preserved. Column order maintained. Added description entries for columns that had none.
